title: Decorations Plus
description: A Datapack that adds 53 new craftable decorations to the game with no resourcepack required!
body:
![decorations plus banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/089a4cf40d230a55da2e43e5d0daa17b6402dae5.png) [![wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/Wiki-Crafting%20Recipes-gold?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://yoavtc.github.io/deco-plus/) [![git](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/yoavtc/deco-plus?logo=github)](https://github.com/YoavTC/deco-plus/releases) [![modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-gray?logo=modrinth)](modrinth.com/datapack/decorations-plus) [![curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-gray?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/decorations-plus) [![PM](https://img.shields.io/badge/𝗣𝗠-%20Planet%20Minecraft-gray)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/decorations-plus-6298249/) Decorate your world with over **60** new decorations **without any resourcepacks or mods**!
Video showcases: [v1.0](https://youtu.be/dVdzepZIkdA) | [v3.0](https://youtu.be/zXux7zpK8j8) | [v4.0](https://youtu.be/-ktYZgRxIRc) | [v6.0](https://youtu.be/TVBZEzd_COQ) ## [Decorations List](https://yoavtc.github.io/deco-plus/): ![grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc24aa2c95c784c702576a6f985c4c634836fa4a.webp) # Credits: [BD Models](https://block-display.com/) for hosting a vast library of Block Display models, and the [Block Display Minecraft](https://discord.com/invite/VCeHfSd6Xa) community for creating them! ### Model Creators: - [DaftCraftYT](https://bde.gg/u/daftcraft/) - Bamboo Flower Cart, Controller, Round Barrel - [AlmazAr3](https://bde.gg/u/almazar/) - Caution Sign, Telescope, Nintendo Switch, Restaurant Sign - [\_\_ZolMik\_\_](https://zolmik.bde.gg/) - Chess Board, Red Clock - [Bom2u](https://bde.gg/u/bom2u) - Cookie Oven, Book and Ink - [Mastay](https://bde.gg/u/Mastay) - Fake Herobrine - [HappyWaffle5897](https://bde.gg/u/goodentity) - Fire Log Pile - [yersacaltara](https://block-display.com/author/c37800efb0c16751d102d9c0d0d044ce/) - Firework Small Box - [shard](https://bde.gg/u/shard) - Globe, Wooden Beer Mug - [F0X_jL](https://bde.gg/u/F0X_jL) - Lamp, Large Candlestick - [fluffa01](https://bde.gg/u/fluffa01) - Little Creeper `(modified)` - [Kromakur](https://bde.gg/u/Kromakur) - Magma Block Potion, Sculk Potion, Slime Block Potion - [Dewox](https://bde.gg/u/Dewox) - Punching Bag - [Deadtale2659](https://bde.gg/u/Deadtale) - Rocks - [Miiidav](https://bde.gg/u/midav) - Sitting Skeleton - [LeRocher44](https://block-display.com/author/c77f000560848899c6ede62f57a43927/) - Tiny Tree - [Rasterio_](https://bde.gg/u/Rasterio_/) - Trash Can, Bread Basket, Bar Stool - [KRiSinnit](https://bde.gg/u/luiginhoyt) - Window Barricades - [Yegor_Mechanic](yegor_mechanic.bde.gg) - Sewing Machine - [ItzDuck_](https://block-display.com/author/duck) - Harp - [Ya_Brutal](https://https://block-display.com/author/ya_brutal) - Glow Berries Barrel, Sweet Berries Barrel, Fish Barrel, Potato Barrel, Weapons Barrel, Cartography Table - [Ares_Ryuu](https://block-display.com/author/ares_ryuu/) - Japanese Bamboo Plant - [q8h](https://block-display.com/author/q8h/) - Easter Basket - [\_cv9itoi_tattok\_](https://block-display.com/author/_cv9itoi_tattok_/) - Ducky - [HaniVindinggame](https://block-display.com/author/hanivindinggame/) - Animal Skull, Open Book, Books and Candles - [Vinc_bde](https://block-display.com/author/vinc_bde/) - Bricks - [comrade_floppa](https://block-display.com/author/comrade_floppa/) - Little Villager - [Markovich001](https://block-display.com/author/markovich001/) - Broken Pot - [bl4ck_bone](https://block-display.com/author/bl4ack_bone/) - Little Enderman - [Voodus_](https://block-display.com/author/voodus_/) - Ship in a Bottle - [S2ml](https://block-display.com/author/s2ml/) - Standing Fishing Rod - [Layms](https://block-display.com/author/layms/) - Target Practice - [Fituu_](https://block-display.com/author/fituu/) - Training Dummy - [PinkMike](https://block-display.com/author/pink/) - Bottles - [AlbensL](https://block-display.com/author/albensl/) - Potted Plants
